<a id="class-base-control"></a>

# Base_Control

**Inherits:** `Node3D`

**Inherited By:** [Performance_Pad_Control](class_performance_pad_control.md#class-performance-pad-control)

Base class for physical deck controls. Handles hover/press visual state and pose-gated activation from Player_Finger areas.

## Properties

| `MeshInstance3D`     | [Target_Mesh](#class-base-control-property-target-mesh)                                       |                    |
|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------|

| `float`              | [press_tween_distance_meters](#class-base-control-property-press-tween-distance-meters)       | `0.003`            |
| `float`              | [press_tween_duration_seconds](#class-base-control-property-press-tween-duration-seconds)     | `0.06`             |
| `bool`               | [enable_press_feedback_tween](#class-base-control-property-enable-press-feedback-tween)       | `true`             |
| `String`             | [Control_Display_Name](#class-base-control-property-control-display-name)                     |                    |
